General.Name: SuperRobotics Ltd
General.Description: SuperRobotics Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides engineering products and related services in Hong Kong and the People's Republic of China. It offers equipment installation, and support and maintenance services for robotics and automation systems. The company was formerly known as SuperRobotics Limited. SuperRobotics Holdings Limited was incorporated in 2014 and is headquartered in Sheung Wan, Hong Kong.
General.Address: China Merchants Tower, Sheung Wan, Hong Kong
